title: Solid-State Diffusion (Fick + Onsager) Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: dc_i/dt = div(D_ij * grad(c_j) + D_thermo * grad(T)); tracer diffusivity D*_i from Nernst-Einstein
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Solid-State Diffusion (Fick + Onsager)

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=15) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class Crank-Nicolson FD; FEM for complex geometries; Bayesian inversion for D_ij provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
